name: Urban Riot Blaster
description: Urban Riot Blaster is a fast-paced top-down arcade shooter set in a city taken over by chaos. Control an automated combat drone and eliminate waves of hostile targets while surviving intense urban battles. Choose your difficulty and push your reflexes as enemies become faster and more aggressive over time. One mistake ends the run. Designed for short, adrenaline-filled sessions with pure action and no distractions.
instructions: Move freely destroy enemies automatically survive as long as possible Choose your difficulty and react fast mdash one hit ends the game
